usercmd.promptHint: Use $1, $2 … for positional args, $* for all args.
usercmd.promptPlaceholder: Review the staged changes carefully. Focus on $1 if provided.
skillmodal.title: Create skill
appearance.notifyLabel: Show a desktop notification when a background task finishes, or when a chat reply finishes while you're on another session or app.
appearance.notifyHint: In-app toasts always appear; this also surfaces a desktop notification (needs browser permission). Your choice is saved on the server.
appearance.themeHint: Pick a color palette. Applied immediately and saved on the server.
appearance.languageHint: Choose the interface language. The page reloads to apply it; your choice is saved on the server.
common.name: Name
app.error.lostConnection: ⚠️ Lost connection to the server. The agent may still be finishing — reopen this chat to see its reply.
app.skill.nameInvalid: Name must match: lowercase letters, digits, '-' or '.' (1–63 chars).
app.folder.deleteMsgFolder: Permanently delete “{name}” and all its contents? This cannot be undone.
app.folder.deleteMsgFile: Permanently delete “{name}”? This cannot be undone.
app.rewind.title: Rewind conversation
app.rewind.message: This permanently removes this turn and everything after it from this conversation. Earlier turns are kept and the model's memory is rewound to match. Continue?
app.notify.allowMsg: Notifications are turned on in Omnis, but your browser is blocking them for this site. {hint} A website can't grant this itself — it has to be allowed in the browser.
app.update.downloading: Downloading and installing… this can take a minute.
app.update.installedRestart: Installed v{version}. Restart the server to run the new version.
app.provider.stillBad: Still can't connect: {providers}. Check the values and try again.
app.notify.unblockFirefox: Click the permissions icon at the left of the address bar and clear the “Blocked” state for Notifications (or set it to Allow), then reload.
app.notify.unblockSafari: Open Safari → Settings → Websites → Notifications and set this site to Allow, then reload.
app.notify.unblockChromium: Click the site-info icon (the tune/ⓘ control just left of the address bar) → Site settings → Notifications → Allow, then reload.
tool.desc.Bash: Run shell commands in the working directory.
tool.desc.Read: Read file contents from the filesystem.
tool.desc.Write: Write or overwrite files on the filesystem.
tool.desc.Edit: Surgical in-place string replacement in a file.
tool.desc.Grep: Search file contents with regular expressions.
tool.desc.revert: Revert a file to its last snapshot.
tool.desc.mime: Detect the MIME type of a file.
tool.desc.mcp: MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools: connect to external MCP servers defined in mcp_config.json.
tool.desc.Skill: Skill tools: load and list skill playbooks from the skills/ directory.
tool.desc.softskills: Soft-skill tools: load and list curator-distilled procedures from the softskills/ directory.
tool.desc.calc: Calculator: evaluate mathematical expressions (arithmetic, sqrt, trig, log, pow…).
tool.desc.ddg: Web search: search the web via DuckDuckGo (no API key required).
tool.desc.serpapi: Web search: search the web via SerpAPI (Google). Requires serpapi_key in globals. Cannot be used together with ddg.
tool.desc.web: Web tools: fetch a web page as Markdown (web_fetch) or convert an HTML string to Markdown (html_to_markdown).
tool.desc.registries: Skill registry tools: list configured remote registries, browse them, fetch a SKILL.md, install a skill, and link it to an agent.
tool.desc.code_search: Semantic code search (search_code, reindex_code): find code by meaning over the repo index. Mounted only when an embedding model is configured; otherwise the agent falls back to grep/read.
tool.desc.docs: Documentation tools: answer questions about omnis from its own docs. Always provides list_docs / read_doc / grep_docs; adds semantic search_docs / reindex_docs when an embedding model is configured.
set.cmd.empty: No user commands yet. Click "Add command" to create one.
set.cmd.hint: Slash commands shown in the chat composer. Built-in commands are reserved. User commands expand to a prompt template that is sent to the agent — use $1, $2, … for positional args and $* for all args.
set.banner.restartText: Embedder changed — a server restart is required to apply it (hot-reload can't swap the embedder).
set.banner.reloadText: Configuration changed — apply with hot-reload (no downtime).
set.banner.reloaded: Reloaded — new sessions will use the updated configuration.
set.overlay.restartingFull:
Server is restarting…
The page will reload automatically.
set.reload.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Save them before reloading?
set.reload.summaryDraining: Reloaded — generation {generation}. {count} session(s) draining on previous version.
set.reload.failedBanner: Reload failed: {error} — fix the configuration and try again.
set.restart.confirm: Restart the omnis server now? Active streams will be interrupted.
set.restart.pageReload: Server restarting — page will reload shortly…
set.restart.notBack: Server did not come back within 30s. Reload manually.
set.confirm.discardTab: Discard unsaved changes in the current tab?
set.confirm.discardView: Discard unsaved changes in this view?
set.confirm.expectedServersInputs: Expected a JSON object with `servers` and/or `inputs`.
set.confirm.nothingToImport: Nothing to import — no valid servers or inputs found.
set.confirm.skillStillUsed: "{name}" is still used by: {agents}. Remove links and delete?
set.confirm.installSquad: Install squad "{name}"? It will be merged into config/agents.json and available after the next reload.
